positive: A magnificent, ancient forest guardian creature—a blend of celestial dragon and redwood tree—emerging from bioluminescent fog. The scene is highly dramatic, featuring glowing runes etched into mossy stone and giant, ethereal flora. Fantasy concept art, deep jewel tones, volumetric lighting, epic scale, cinematic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, simple background, modern technology, cartoonish
